name: cursor-cli-adversarial-implementation-review-loop
title: cursor-cli-adversarial-implementation-review-loop
description: Run a scoped Cursor CLI implementation request, adversarially review the implemented result, delegate blocking fixes, and repeat until no high or medium findings remain.
